metadata.description: AI-first plugins for building 3D, AR, and vertical apps. SceneView SDK toolkit plus high-traffic API-bridge MCPs (real-estate, french admin, e-commerce 3D, architecture).

plugins.name: sceneview
plugins.description: AI-first toolkit for building 3D and AR apps with SceneView (Android, iOS, Web). Bundles the sceneview-mcp server + 11 contributor commands.

plugins.name: realestate-3d
plugins.description: MCP for AI-generated 3D real-estate listings, virtual tours, and floorplans. Connects Claude to the realestate-mcp toolkit.

plugins.name: french-admin
plugins.description: MCP for French administrative paperwork — Service-Public.fr lookups, RIB/SIRET/IBAN validation, CAF/Pôle Emploi/Impôts workflows.

plugins.name: ecommerce-3d
plugins.description: MCP for AI-generated 3D product viewers and AR try-on for e-commerce. Connects Claude to the ecommerce-3d-mcp toolkit.

plugins.name: architecture-3d
plugins.description: MCP for architectural visualization — building models, lighting studies, AR site previews. Connects Claude to the architecture-mcp toolkit.
